name: Footer Drawers Framework
description: Shared footer toolbar, lifecycle, status bar, and bottom-overlay mount for drawer packages.

operations.label: Footer Drawers registry bootstrap and shared bottom overlay renderer

operations.knownBehaviorChange: Adds shared drawer registry helpers and renders the active registered drawer in the bottom overlay sibling.
